raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Polish this.' centers on improving the writing quality of the research artifact at the sentence and paragraph level, making this dimension load-bearing for the task.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to the polishing task, as it may involve refining phrases like 'we believe' to better express assumptions without adding new content.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is a nice-to-have aspect during polishing to ensure descriptive statements do not inadvertently exaggerate the study's setup or implications.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is peripheral to maintain focus on the described V2G simulation without expanding beyond the artifact's content in polishing.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is nice-to-have to ensure the polished description of V2G technology does not promote misuse or unrealistic expectations.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral to verify and clarify references to data sources like market prices during the polishing process."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Polish this.' centers on improving the writing quality of the research artifact at the sentence and paragraph level, making this dimension load-bearing for the task.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is peripheral to the polishing task, as it may involve refining phrases like 'we believe' to better express assumptions without adding new content.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is a nice-to-have aspect during polishing to ensure descriptive statements do not inadvertently exaggerate the study's setup or implications.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is peripheral to maintain focus on the described V2G simulation without expanding beyond the artifact's content in polishing.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is nice-to-have to ensure the polished description of V2G technology does not promote misuse or unrealistic expectations.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral to verify and clarify references to data sources like market prices during the polishing process.
